name: Summary
query:
SELECT
    COALESCE(CONCAT(a.clm_src_sbsys_cd, '(', a.subsource_nm, ')'), 'Not Available') AS subsource_nm,
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.enterprise_indv_id) AS TotalScreens,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.enterprise_indv_id IS NULL THEN a.enterprise_indv_id ELSE NULL END) AS NoResults,
    COUNT(DISTINCT b.enterprise_indv_id) AS ResultsSubmitted,
    ROUND((NoResults / TotalScreens::FLOAT) * 100, 2) AS PercentNoResults,
    ROUND((ResultsSubmitted / TotalScreens::FLOAT) * 100, 2) AS PercentResultsSubmitted
FROM (
    SELECT
        c.*,
        MAX(x.subsource_nm) AS subsource_nm
    FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c
    LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x
        ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd = x.orig_src_sbsys
       AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys
    WHERE x.subsource_nm ILIKE ANY ('%Athena%', '%eCW%', '%Veradigm%', '%Next%Gen%', '%Cerner%', '%EPP%')
      AND med_srvc_cd IN ('83036', '83037')
      AND c.strt_srvc_dt >= '2026-01-01'
      AND c.LATEST_CLAIM = 'Y'
    GROUP BY ALL
) A
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT *
    FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c
    LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x
        ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd = x.orig_src_sbsys
       AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys
    WHERE cd_sys_txt = 'LOINC'
      AND c.strt_srvc_dt >= '2026-01-01'

    UNION

    SELECT *
    FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c
    LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x
        ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd = x.orig_src_sbsys
       AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys
    WHERE cd_sys_txt = 'CPT-CAT-II'
      AND c.strt_srvc_dt >= '2026-01-01'
) B
    ON A.enterprise_indv_id = B.enterprise_indv_id
   AND b.strt_srvc_dt BETWEEN a.strt_srvc_dt AND DATEADD(DAY, 15, a.strt_srvc_dt)
   AND YEAR(a.strt_srvc_dt) = YEAR(b.strt_srvc_dt)
GROUP BY ALL

UNION

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN a.prov_full_nm ILIKE 'LAB%CORP%' THEN 'LABCORP'
        WHEN a.prov_full_nm ILIKE 'QUEST%DIAG%' THEN 'QUEST'
        WHEN a.prov_full_nm ILIKE 'BIO%REF%' THEN 'BIO REFERENCE'
        ELSE a.prov_full_nm
    END AS prov_full_nm,
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.enterprise_indv_id) AS TotalScreens,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.enterprise_indv_id IS NULL THEN a.enterprise_indv_id ELSE NULL END) AS NoResults,
    COUNT(DISTINCT b.enterprise_indv_id) AS ResultsSubmitted,
    ROUND((NoResults / TotalScreens::FLOAT) * 100, 2) AS PercentNoResults,
    ROUND((ResultsSubmitted / TotalScreens::FLOAT) * 100, 2) AS PercentResultsSubmitted
FROM (
    SELECT *
    FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c
    LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x
        ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd = x.orig_src_sbsys
       AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys
    WHERE prov_full_nm ILIKE ANY ('QUEST%DIAG%', 'LAB%CORP%', 'BIO%REF%')
      AND med_srvc_cd IN ('83036', '83037')
      AND c.strt_srvc_dt >= '2026-01-01'
      AND c.LATEST_CLAIM = 'Y'
) A
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT *
    FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c
    LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x
        ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd = x.orig_src_sbsys
       AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys
    WHERE cd_sys_txt = 'LOINC'
      AND c.strt_srvc_dt >= '2026-01-01'

    UNION

    SELECT *
    FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c
    LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x
        ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd = x.orig_src_sbsys
       AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys
    WHERE cd_sys_txt = 'CPT-CAT-II'
      AND c.strt_srvc_dt >= '2026-01-01'
) B
    ON A.enterprise_indv_id = B.enterprise_indv_id
   AND b.strt_srvc_dt BETWEEN a.strt_srvc_dt AND DATEADD(DAY, 15, a.strt_srvc_dt)
   AND YEAR(a.strt_srvc_dt) = YEAR(b.strt_srvc_dt)
GROUP BY ALL

name: HS_PG distribution
query: SELECT Submitter, Group_Id, Group_Name, Group_Type, DOS,SUM(MemberCount) AS MemberCount FROM ( SELECT x.submitter, COALESCE(xw.ASSOC_PROV_HLTH_SYS_ID, xw.assoc_prov_grp_id) AS Group_Id, COALESCE(xw.ASSOC_PROV_HLTH_SYS_NM, xw.assoc_prov_grp_nm) AS Group_Name, CASE WHEN xw.assoc_prov_hlth_sys_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Health System'      WHEN xw.assoc_prov_grp_id IS NOT NULL THEN xw.ASSOC_PROV_GRP_TYP_CD      ELSE NULL END AS Group_Type, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=30 THEN 'within last month'      WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>30 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=60 THEN '2 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>60 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=90 THEN '3 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>90 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=120 THEN '4 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>120 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=150 THEN '5 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>150 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=180 THEN '6 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>180 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=210 THEN '7 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>210 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=240 THEN '8 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>240 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=270 THEN '9 months'                ELSE '10+ months' END AS DOS,                                count(DISTINCT x.enterprise_indv_id) AS MemberCount   FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN a.prov_full_nm iLIKE 'LAB%CORP%' THEN 'LABCORP'                                              WHEN a.prov_full_nm iLIKE 'QUEST%DIAG%' THEN 'QUEST'                                              WHEN a.prov_full_nm iLIKE 'BIO%REF%' THEN 'BIO REFERENCE'                                              ELSE a.prov_full_nm END AS submitter, CASE WHEN b.enterprise_indv_id IS NULL THEN 'NR' ELSE NULL END AS NoResults, a.* FROM ( SELECT * FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd=x.orig_src_sbsys AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys WHERE prov_full_nm iLIKE ANY ('QUEST%DIAG%', 'LAB%CORP%', 'BIO%REF%') AND med_srvc_cd IN ('83036','83037') AND c.strt_srvc_dt>='2026-01-01' AND c.LATEST_CLAIM ='Y' ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd=x.orig_src_sbsys AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys WHERE cd_sys_txt ='LOINC' AND c.strt_srvc_dt>='2026-01-01' )B ON A.enterprise_indv_id = B.enterprise_indv_id AND b.strt_srvc_dt BETWEEN a.strt_srvc_dt and dateadd(DAY,7,a.strt_srvc_dt) AND year(a.strt_srvc_dt)=year(b.strt_srvc_dt) )x LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.DATAOPS_FOUNDATION.MNR_MDE_VW_CMTH_MBR_PROV_XW xw ON xw.enterprise_indv_id = x.enterprise_indv_id WHERE noresults ='NR' GROUP BY ALL union SELECT x.submitter, COALESCE(xw.ASSOC_PROV_HLTH_SYS_ID, xw.assoc_prov_grp_id) AS Group_Id, COALESCE(xw.ASSOC_PROV_HLTH_SYS_NM, xw.assoc_prov_grp_nm) AS Group_Name, CASE WHEN xw.assoc_prov_hlth_sys_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Health System'      WHEN xw.assoc_prov_grp_id IS NOT NULL THEN xw.ASSOC_PROV_GRP_TYP_CD      ELSE NULL END AS Group_Type, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=30 THEN 'within last month'      WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>30 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=60 THEN '2 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>60 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=90 THEN '3 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>90 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=120 THEN '4 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>120 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=150 THEN '5 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>150 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=180 THEN '6 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>180 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=210 THEN '7 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>210 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=240 THEN '8 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>240 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=270 THEN '9 months'                ELSE '10+ months' END AS DOS,                count(DISTINCT x.enterprise_indv_id) AS MemberCount   FROM ( SELECT a.subsource_nm AS submitter, CASE WHEN b.enterprise_indv_id IS NULL THEN 'NR' ELSE NULL END AS NoResults, a.*     FROM ( SELECT c.*, max(x.subsource_nm) AS subsource_nm FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd=x.orig_src_sbsys AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys WHERE x.subsource_nm ILIKE ANY ( '%Athena%', '%eCW%', '%Veradigm%', '%Next%Gen%', '%Cerner%', '%EPP%') AND med_srvc_cd IN ('83036','83037') AND c.strt_srvc_dt>='2026-01-01' AND c.LATEST_CLAIM ='Y' GROUP BY all ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd=x.orig_src_sbsys AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys WHERE cd_sys_txt ='LOINC' AND c.strt_srvc_dt>='2026-01-01' )B ON A.enterprise_indv_id = B.enterprise_indv_id AND b.strt_srvc_dt BETWEEN a.strt_srvc_dt and dateadd(DAY,7,a.strt_srvc_dt) AND year(a.strt_srvc_dt)=year(b.strt_srvc_dt) GROUP BY ALL )x LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.DATAOPS_FOUNDATION.MNR_MDE_VW_CMTH_MBR_PROV_XW xw ON xw.enterprise_indv_id = x.enterprise_indv_id WHERE noresults ='NR' GROUP BY ALL )x GROUP BY all

name: Contr_Distribution
query: SELECT Submitter, mbr_contr_num, DOS,SUM(MemberCount) AS MemberCount FROM ( SELECT x.submitter, xw.mbr_contr_num, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=30 THEN 'within last month'      WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>30 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=60 THEN '2 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>60 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=90 THEN '3 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>90 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=120 THEN '4 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>120 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=150 THEN '5 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>150 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=180 THEN '6 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>180 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=210 THEN '7 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>210 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=240 THEN '8 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>240 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=270 THEN '9 months'                ELSE '10+ months' END AS DOS,                                count(DISTINCT x.enterprise_indv_id) AS MemberCount   FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN a.prov_full_nm iLIKE 'LAB%CORP%' THEN 'LABCORP'                                              WHEN a.prov_full_nm iLIKE 'QUEST%DIAG%' THEN 'QUEST'                                              WHEN a.prov_full_nm iLIKE 'BIO%REF%' THEN 'BIO REFERENCE'                                              ELSE a.prov_full_nm END AS submitter, CASE WHEN b.enterprise_indv_id IS NULL THEN 'NR' ELSE NULL END AS NoResults, a.* FROM ( SELECT * FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd=x.orig_src_sbsys AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys WHERE prov_full_nm iLIKE ANY ('QUEST%DIAG%', 'LAB%CORP%', 'BIO%REF%') AND med_srvc_cd IN ('83036','83037') AND c.strt_srvc_dt>='2026-01-01' AND c.LATEST_CLAIM ='Y' ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd=x.orig_src_sbsys AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys WHERE cd_sys_txt ='LOINC' AND c.strt_srvc_dt>='2026-01-01' )B ON A.enterprise_indv_id = B.enterprise_indv_id AND b.strt_srvc_dt BETWEEN a.strt_srvc_dt and dateadd(DAY,7,a.strt_srvc_dt) AND year(a.strt_srvc_dt)=year(b.strt_srvc_dt) )x LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.DATAOPS_FOUNDATION.MNR_MDE_VW_CMTH_MBR_demo xw ON xw.enterprise_indv_id = x.enterprise_indv_id WHERE noresults ='NR' GROUP BY ALL union SELECT x.submitter, xw.mbr_contr_num, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=30 THEN 'within last month'      WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>30 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=60 THEN '2 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>60 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=90 THEN '3 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>90 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=120 THEN '4 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>120 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=150 THEN '5 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>150 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=180 THEN '6 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>180 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=210 THEN '7 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>210 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=240 THEN '8 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>240 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=270 THEN '9 months'                ELSE '10+ months' END AS DOS,                count(DISTINCT x.enterprise_indv_id) AS MemberCount   FROM ( SELECT a.subsource_nm AS submitter, CASE WHEN b.enterprise_indv_id IS NULL THEN 'NR' ELSE NULL END AS NoResults, a.*     FROM ( SELECT c.*, max(x.subsource_nm) AS subsource_nm FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd=x.orig_src_sbsys AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys WHERE x.subsource_nm ILIKE ANY ( '%Athena%', '%eCW%', '%Veradigm%', '%Next%Gen%', '%Cerner%', '%EPP%') AND med_srvc_cd IN ('83036','83037') AND c.strt_srvc_dt>='2026-01-01' AND c.LATEST_CLAIM ='Y' GROUP BY all ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd=x.orig_src_sbsys AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys WHERE cd_sys_txt ='LOINC' AND c.strt_srvc_dt>='2026-01-01' )B ON A.enterprise_indv_id = B.enterprise_indv_id AND b.strt_srvc_dt BETWEEN a.strt_srvc_dt and dateadd(DAY,7,a.strt_srvc_dt) AND year(a.strt_srvc_dt)=year(b.strt_srvc_dt) GROUP BY ALL )x LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.DATAOPS_FOUNDATION.MNR_MDE_VW_CMTH_MBR_demo xw ON xw.enterprise_indv_id = x.enterprise_indv_id WHERE noresults ='NR' GROUP BY ALL )x GROUP BY all

name: Member Detail
query: SELECT DISTINCT SUBMITTER,MBR_MBI,MBR_CONTR_NUM,MBR_PBP_CD,GROUP_ID,GROUP_NAME,GROUP_TYPE,DOS FROM ( SELECT x.submitter, COALESCE(xw.ASSOC_PROV_HLTH_SYS_ID, xw.assoc_prov_grp_id) AS Group_Id, COALESCE(xw.ASSOC_PROV_HLTH_SYS_NM, xw.assoc_prov_grp_nm) AS Group_Name, CASE WHEN xw.assoc_prov_hlth_sys_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Health System'      WHEN xw.assoc_prov_grp_id IS NOT NULL THEN xw.ASSOC_PROV_GRP_TYP_CD      ELSE NULL END AS Group_Type, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=30 THEN 'within last month'      WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>30 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=60 THEN '2 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>60 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=90 THEN '3 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>90 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=120 THEN '4 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>120 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=150 THEN '5 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>150 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=180 THEN '6 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>180 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=210 THEN '7 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>210 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=240 THEN '8 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>240 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=270 THEN '9 months'                ELSE '10+ months' END AS DOS,                  x.enterprise_indv_id, MC.mbr_mbi, md.mbr_contr_num,md.mbr_pbp_cd   FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN a.prov_full_nm iLIKE 'LAB%CORP%' THEN 'LABCORP'                                              WHEN a.prov_full_nm iLIKE 'QUEST%DIAG%' THEN 'QUEST'                                              WHEN a.prov_full_nm iLIKE 'BIO%REF%' THEN 'BIO REFERENCE'                                              ELSE a.prov_full_nm END AS submitter, CASE WHEN b.enterprise_indv_id IS NULL THEN 'NR' ELSE NULL END AS NoResults, a.* FROM ( SELECT * FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd=x.orig_src_sbsys AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys WHERE prov_full_nm iLIKE ANY ('QUEST%DIAG%', 'LAB%CORP%', 'BIO%REF%') AND med_srvc_cd IN ('83036','83037') AND c.strt_srvc_dt>='2026-01-01' AND c.LATEST_CLAIM ='Y' ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd=x.orig_src_sbsys AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys WHERE cd_sys_txt ='LOINC' AND c.strt_srvc_dt>='2026-01-01' )B ON A.enterprise_indv_id = B.enterprise_indv_id AND b.strt_srvc_dt BETWEEN a.strt_srvc_dt and dateadd(DAY,7,a.strt_srvc_dt) AND year(a.strt_srvc_dt)=year(b.strt_srvc_dt) )x LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.DATAOPS_FOUNDATION.MNR_MDE_VW_CMTH_MBR_DEMO MD ON MD.enterprise_indv_id = x.enterprise_indv_id LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.DATAOPS_FOUNDATION.MNR_MDE_VW_CMTH_MBR_PROV_XW xw ON xw.enterprise_indv_id = x.enterprise_indv_id INNER JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.DATAOPS_FOUNDATION.MNR_MDE_VW_CMTH_MBR_CORE MC ON MC.enterprise_indv_id = x.enterprise_indv_id WHERE noresults ='NR' GROUP BY ALL union SELECT x.submitter, COALESCE(xw.ASSOC_PROV_HLTH_SYS_ID, xw.assoc_prov_grp_id) AS Group_Id, COALESCE(xw.ASSOC_PROV_HLTH_SYS_NM, xw.assoc_prov_grp_nm) AS Group_Name, CASE WHEN xw.assoc_prov_hlth_sys_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Health System'      WHEN xw.assoc_prov_grp_id IS NOT NULL THEN xw.ASSOC_PROV_GRP_TYP_CD      ELSE NULL END AS Group_Type, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=30 THEN 'within last month'      WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>30 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=60 THEN '2 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>60 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=90 THEN '3 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>90 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=120 THEN '4 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>120 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=150 THEN '5 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>150 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=180 THEN '6 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>180 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=210 THEN '7 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>210 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=240 THEN '8 months'                WHEN DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)>240 AND DATEDIFF('day',x.strt_srvc_dt, CURRENT_DATE)<=270 THEN '9 months'                ELSE '10+ months' END AS DOS,                x.enterprise_indv_id, MC.mbr_mbi, md.mbr_contr_num,md.mbr_pbp_cd FROM ( SELECT a.subsource_nm AS submitter, CASE WHEN b.enterprise_indv_id IS NULL THEN 'NR' ELSE NULL END AS NoResults, a.*     FROM ( SELECT c.*, max(x.subsource_nm) AS subsource_nm FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd=x.orig_src_sbsys AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys WHERE x.subsource_nm ILIKE ANY ( '%Athena%', '%eCW%', '%Veradigm%', '%Next%Gen%', '%Cerner%', '%EPP%') AND med_srvc_cd IN ('83036','83037') AND c.strt_srvc_dt>='2026-01-01' AND c.LATEST_CLAIM ='Y' GROUP BY all ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM SPBT_PRD_STARS_DQI_DB.DATAINSIGHTS_COMPACT.ALL_A1c_Claims_tin c LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.dataops_foundation.CIA_XW_SOURCES x ON c.clm_src_sbsys_cd=x.orig_src_sbsys AND c.clm_src_sys_cd = x.orig_src_sys WHERE cd_sys_txt ='LOINC' AND c.strt_srvc_dt>='2026-01-01' )B ON A.enterprise_indv_id = B.enterprise_indv_id AND b.strt_srvc_dt BETWEEN a.strt_srvc_dt and dateadd(DAY,7,a.strt_srvc_dt) AND year(a.strt_srvc_dt)=year(b.strt_srvc_dt) GROUP BY ALL )x LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.DATAOPS_FOUNDATION.MNR_MDE_VW_CMTH_MBR_DEMO MD ON MD.enterprise_indv_id = x.enterprise_indv_id LEFT JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.DATAOPS_FOUNDATION.MNR_MDE_VW_CMTH_MBR_PROV_XW xw ON xw.enterprise_indv_id = x.enterprise_indv_id INNER JOIN QUMXA_PRD_STARS_DO_DB.DATAOPS_FOUNDATION.MNR_MDE_VW_CMTH_MBR_CORE MC ON MC.enterprise_indv_id = x.enterprise_indv_id WHERE noresults ='NR' GROUP BY ALL )x GROUP BY all
